description_long: This is a portable, freestanding caution sign made of yellow plastic, commonly used to warn pedestrians of wet floors. The sign features a large triangular warning symbol with a pictogram of a person slipping, accompanied by the bold text 'CAUTION WET FLOOR' in black. The surface has a slightly textured, matte finish with subtle molded details, including a handle at the top for easy carrying and a ribbed pattern at the bottom for added stability. The sign is constructed as a folding A-frame, allowing it to stand upright on flat surfaces and be easily collapsed for storage. Both sides of the sign display identical warning graphics, ensuring visibility from either direction. The overall design is lightweight, durable, and intended for temporary placement in high-traffic indoor or outdoor areas.
description: A yellow, folding plastic caution sign with 'CAUTION WET FLOOR' text and a slipping person icon, designed for portable use in public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the warning symbol, text, and handle at the top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin, A-frame profile and hinge at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view, identical to the front, with the same warning symbol and text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow A-frame structure and hinge.
